mapper.select: ORDER BY r.sort_num ASC, r.id ASC, sf.id ASC
ORDER BY r.sort_num ASC, r.id ASC, sf.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT mp.id AS policy_id, mp.sensitive_field_id AS sensitive_field_id, mp.masking_type AS masking_type, mtd.type_name AS masking_type_name, CAST(mp.params AS CHAR) AS params, mp.is_default AS default_policy FROM masking_policy mp LEFT JOIN masking_type_dict mtd ON mtd.type_code = mp.masking_type ORDER BY mp.sensitive_field_id ASC, mp.is_default DESC, mp.id ASC

SELECT sf.id AS sensitive_field_id, sf.table_name AS table_name, sf.column_name AS column_name, sf.sensitive_type AS sensitive_type, sf.sensitive_level AS sensitive_level, CONCAT(sf.table_name, '.', sf.column_name) AS field_label FROM sensitive_field sf WHERE sf.enabled = 1 ORDER BY sf.table_name ASC, sf.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sensitive_field WHERE id = #{sensitiveFieldId} AND enabled = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO masking_rule_assignment (role_id, policy_id, enabled) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{policyId}, #{enabled})
